data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplification of user choices to enhance engagement and decision-making.
data.technical_spec: Employs intuitive navigation and minimalistic design for content discovery.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: A modern, visually appealing user interface that enhances perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: Consistent branding elements and adaptive design across devices.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimized screen layout to facilitate easier navigation and control access.
data.technical_spec: Quick access icons positioned for ergonomical reach on various devices.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Aligns interface elements with user expectations based on familiar web experiences.
data.technical_spec: Standardized menu placements and iconography conforming to industry norms.

data.title: Pareto Principle
data.description: Focus on high-impact features that deliver most user value and satisfaction.
data.technical_spec: Feature preferences informed by heavy data analysis of viewing habits.
